summary:
The hidden issue was that the scheduler’s assumed entry was dropped silently when a newer informer update arrived.  
Fix: when we detect the newer version, we now set conflictNotified = true before deleting the assumed object, allowing callers to recognise the conflict.

`test.sh` now passes:

after assume: version=5 data="assumed-by-scheduler"  
after informer: version=6 data="informer-update"  
still assumed: false  
OK: conflict notified  
PASS
